steps.title: Show singular possession
steps.content: The sentence mentions inserting a screw, so the possessor is singular. The straw is bound around the threads belonging to that one screw, which requires a singular possessive form before the plural noun threads.

steps.title: Reject malformed possessives
steps.content: A adds a possessive ending to threads and creates an incorrect double possessive. B uses a plural possessor even though there is one screw. D puts the possessive mark on threads instead of screw. The answer is C.
